info.title: ProsodyAI API
info.description:
Prosody-driven KPI prediction API powered by State Space Models.

    ## How It Works

    1. **Define KPIs** on the ProsodyAI dashboard (what you care about)
    2. **Send audio** to this API
    3. **Get predictions** for your KPIs based on raw prosodic signals
    4. **Report outcomes** to close the feedback loop and improve predictions

    ## Features

    - **Prosody Analysis**: Extract pitch, energy, rhythm, voice quality features
    - **KPI Prediction**: Predict outcomes for your custom KPIs
    - **Real-time Streaming**: WebSocket-based prosodic feedback for voice agents
    - **Actionable Recommendations**: What to change to improve KPI outcomes

    ## Authentication

    All endpoints require an API key passed via the `X-API-Key` header.
    Manage API keys on the ProsodyAI dashboard.

get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns service status and version information.

post.description: Upload audio for prosody analysis and KPI outcome prediction.
Submit base64-encoded audio for prosody analysis and KPI prediction.
Fetch and analyze audio from a URL.
Analyze audio directly from Google Cloud Storage.
Extract prosodic features from audio without emotion classification.
Human corrects a prosody prediction (VAD values). High-quality training signal.

post.summary: Submit KPI outcomes for a conversation
post.description: Report actual KPI values after a conversation ends. This is the primary training signal for outcome prediction.
Create a new API key for the tenant. The raw key is returned only in this response.

get.description: List API keys for the tenant (masked).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Admin Tenants  Organization Id  Api Keys Get

delete.description: Revoke an API key by ID.

get.description: List users for the tenant (requires User table from schema).

post.description: Assign one or more roles to a user. Replaces existing assignments if needed.

get.description: List all permissions (global list). Optionally include which roles have which permissions.

post.description: Create a new conversation session for the current tenant. Use the returned session_id in analysis and feedback.
Store transcript text for a session. Session must belong to the caller's organization.

post.summary: Register audio metadata for a session
post.description: Register audio metadata (storage path, duration, format) for a session. Blobs go in object storage; this stores the reference.

get.description: List all training runs from GCS, newest first.
Fetch training_metrics.json for a specific training run.

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: Session ID for conversation tracking. Enables trajectory and history-aware predictions.

prediction_id.title: Prediction Id
prediction_id.description: Unique prediction ID for linking feedback/outcomes

signals.title: Signals
signals.description: Interpreted prosodic signals: engagement, stress, certainty, rapport, empathy, tempo, intensity, expressiveness

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.description: Alerts from KPI predictions that crossed thresholds

AnalysisResponse.title: AnalysisResponse
AnalysisResponse.description:
Response from analysis endpoints.

Returns prosodic features and KPI predictions.  No emotion labels.

impact_factors.description: Negative vocal tone is hurting this KPI

recommended_actions.action: Adopt a warmer, more supportive vocal tone

example.text: I've been waiting for 30 minutes and nobody has helped me!

role_ids.title: Role Ids
role_ids.description: Role IDs to assign to the user

storage_path.title: Storage Path
storage_path.description: Path or URL to stored audio (e.g. S3/GCS)

file.title: File

key.title: Key
key.description: The raw API key; only returned once. Store it securely.

prediction_id.title: Prediction Id
prediction_id.description: ID of the prediction to correct

KPIAlertResult.description: Alert fired when a predicted KPI crosses its threshold.

KPIPredictionResult.description: Prediction for a single client-defined KPI.

KPIRecommendedAction.title: KPIRecommendedAction

SessionOutcomeRequest.title: SessionOutcomeRequest
SessionOutcomeRequest.description:
Report actual KPI outcomes after a conversation ends.

This is the ground truth that closes the training feedback loop.
The system learns which prosodic patterns predict which KPI
outcomes for each client.

text.title: Text
text.description: Text to extract phonetic features from
